parsed.summary: This commit renames the npm scope in package.json and plugin metadata, updates CHANGELOG, and adds an interactive menu to the /glm:setup command when already configured. The changes are confined to documentation, markdown command files, and JSON metadata. No executable code, auth logic, data mutations, or runtime paths are modified. The scope rename is a breaking change for existing installs, but this is a metadata/configuration repo (Claude plugin), not a running service, so the blast radius is limited to re-installation. No material adversarial findings supported by the diff.
next_steps: Verify that the npm scope rename from the old scope to the new scope is reflected in any publish/release CI pipelines so consumers can actually install the renamed package.
Confirm that users with the old package name installed get a clear migration path or deprecation notice.
